title: Genesis Protocol: A Lotka-Volterra Inspired Software Organism with Cryptographic Provenance
description: A self-sustaining digital organism implemented as a six-crate Rust workspace. AI agents compete for resources in per-niche pools with logistic regeneration, seasonal oscillation, and stochastic perturbation. Source code integrity verified through per-crate Merkle trees anchored on Polygon mainnet.
notes: Reference implementation of SOP-1 (Software Organism Protocol v1). Companion to The 2,500 Donkeys literary protocol. Both projects share author identity binding via ORCID 0009-0008-8425-939X and on-chain provenance via Polygon LiteraryAnchor contract 0x97f456300817eaE3B40E235857b856dfFE8bba90.
